name: neighborhood
description: MCP server aggregating live crime data from multiple sources

scripts.dev: bun run build:view && bun --watch run src/index.ts
scripts.build:view: VITE_ENTRY=map vite build && VITE_ENTRY=data-table vite build
scripts.build: bun run build:view && bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outfile=build/server.js
